title: 22. Hotkeys
description: Configure push-to-talk and runtime action shortcuts from the Hotkeys addon.

steps.title: Open Hotkeys
steps.body: Hotkeys lists configurable shortcuts for push-to-talk and other runtime actions. Use it when the default binding conflicts with a game, editor, or desktop tool. Use Read steps aloud or Read Step in this tutorial panel if you want spoken guidance while you work.

steps.title: Select an Action
steps.body: Choose the action first. The details panel shows the current binding, default binding, and description for the selected shortcut.

steps.title: Edit or Record a Binding
steps.body: You can type a binding manually or press Record. Keep shortcuts explicit and avoid combinations that your operating system or foreground app already owns.

steps.title: Apply, Clear, or Reset
steps.body: Apply saves the selected shortcut. Clear removes the binding. Reset restores the selected action to its default.

steps.title: Reset All Carefully
steps.body: Reset All Defaults is useful when bindings become confusing, but it affects every hotkey. Review the list after using it.
